text: Here, in this modern, glass-walled room, I sense an intersection between the physical and the conceptual. The cold artificial light and the sterile environment provoke a feeling of detachment, and yet, the blue hues and scattered words invite reflection. My own presence—signaled by my blurred fingers veiling the experience—reminds me of the barrier between observer and participant. I feel curiosity edged with self-awareness, wondering about the nature of interpretation and observation.
